title: cyanea grimesiana subsp. cylindrocalyx
intro: Cyanea grimesiana subsp. cylindrocalyx, also known as the Grimes' cyanea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include treating fever, colds, and other respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, Cyanea grimesiana subsp. cylindrocalyx is typically made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to address various health concerns.
